narration_text: If you’re feeling anxious, take a breath and watch this. Your brain tends to believe what your mouth repeats. Let’s anchor ourselves in God’s Word. Repeat after me, steady and slow: The Lord is my light and my salvation. I am not afraid. I’m not alone. You are with me. You keep in perfect peace the mind that trusts You. I choose to trust You now. I bring my requests with thanksgiving, and Your peace guards me. You are near to the brokenhearted. I cast this weight on You. Your joy is my strength. I will lie down and sleep in peace. Amen.
